pi_items.source: USGS QuakeML downloaded to examples/seiscomp_env/data/fdsn/noto_earthquake.xml explicitly details <text>2024 Noto Peninsula, Japan Earthquake</text>.
task.json objective explicitly instructs the agent to select 'earthquake' as the event type.
convert_quakeml.py explicitly does not apply a type to the scdm.Event object when parsing the data, leaving it undefined, which scolv defaults to 'not set' in its UI.
setup_task.sh explicitly executes 'launch_seiscomp_gui scolv' to spawn the SeisComP application, and task.json references it.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real earthquake data corresponding to the 2024 Noto Peninsula, Japan Earthquake (magnitude 7.5) from the USGS catalog (event us6000m0xl). The data is ingested via convert_quakeml.py, which deliberately omits setting the Event type, resulting in an initial type of 'not set' when launched in the scolv GUI. The agent must update the event type to 'earthquake'.
